title: Ora Visual Semantic Description
description: Four-level semantic description per Lundgard & Satyanarayan (IEEE TVCG 2022), mandated by Protocol v0.2 §8.1. Level 4 is optional; when relation_to_prose is 'redundant' the deeper levels may defer to surrounding prose.

level_1_elemental.description: Chart type, encodings, axis ranges. Required.

level_4_contextual.description: Domain interpretation. Optional; omit when in doubt (Lundgard-Satyanarayan: 63% of blind readers disliked Level 4).

short_alt.description: Cesal-formula alt text: '[chart type] of [data], where [key takeaway].' ≤ 150 chars.

data_table_fallback.description: Tabular fallback for quantitative visuals with ≤ 50 data points. Populate when feasible per §8.1.

type_specific.description: Type-specific augmentation of Level 1 (loops for CLD, optimal path for decision trees, leading hypothesis for ACH, items-per-quadrant for 2×2, threat/consequence counts for bow-tie, etc.). Free-form object; downstream compiler interprets per type.
